titleBands.name: Freshly Briefed Liability
titleBands.description: Still believes the safety briefing was for someone else.
levelUpText: Raider Level {level}: {title}. The clipboard says this counts as growth.
Raider Level {level}: {title}. Training confirms the Raider can now identify most doors.

titleBands.name: Crate Whisperer
titleBands.description: Hears loot calling from inside containers with no handles.
levelUpText: Raider Level {level}: {title}. They saluted a crate and it felt mutual.
Raider Level {level}: {title}. Backpack confidence has reached committee-review levels.

titleBands.name: Tactical Bystander
titleBands.description: Present during major incidents, rarely in a way investigators can prove.
levelUpText: Raider Level {level}: {title}. Their survival strategy now has plausible terminology.
Raider Level {level}: {title}. Several bad decisions have been reclassified as field research.

titleBands.name: Questionable Competence
titleBands.description: Technically improving, emotionally still under investigation.
levelUpText: Raider Level {level}: {title}. Nobody is comfortable with how well this is working.
Raider Level {level}: {title}. Performance review notes: effective, somehow.

titleBands.name: Insurance Incident
titleBands.description: A walking claim form with surprisingly good extraction timing.
levelUpText: Raider Level {level}: {title}. The actuarial table made a small frightened noise.
Raider Level {level}: {title}. The hub insurer has started using first-name basis fees.

titleBands.name: Professional Door Listener
titleBands.description: Can distinguish danger, opportunity, and vending machines through sheet metal.
levelUpText: Raider Level {level}: {title}. The doors have begun asking for privacy.
Raider Level {level}: {title}. Silence now counts as actionable intelligence.

titleBands.name: Certified Problem Extractor
titleBands.description: Extracts loot, stress, and consequences with equal dedication.
levelUpText: Raider Level {level}: {title}. Certification arrived in a bent envelope marked probably fine.
Raider Level {level}: {title}. Extraction paperwork now has a dedicated apology field.

titleBands.name: Veteran of Bad Ideas
titleBands.description: Has survived enough terrible plans to start recognizing the opening moves.
levelUpText: Raider Level {level}: {title}. Experience has hardened into a suspicious little wisdom.
Raider Level {level}: {title}. The Raider now flinches before the mission briefing gets interesting.

titleBands.name: Myth of Desperanza
titleBands.description: Spoken of in hushed tones by people who still refuse to lend them gear.
levelUpText: Raider Level {level}: {title}. Desperanza folklore has lowered its standards and accepted them.
Raider Level {level}: {title}. The legend remains legally nonbinding.
